text:
It was a small town. There was a bakery called Sweet Breadcrumbs. Every morning, the owl caretaker would rise from her nest high in the eaves and flap down to open the door.

One unusual morning, the owl glanced at the clock. It was 12:43 PM. She sighed. There were only a few more hours until her last customer could pick up a loaf of bread.

She baked a fresh cinnamon bun. A small, perfect little bun. The aroma was delightful.

Later, as she cleaned the counters, she remembered how much her favorite customer loved those buns. There was a little girl named Clara.

With a mischievous grin, the owl tucked a cinnamon bun into Clara's teddy bear.

Clara laughed when she woke up that morning. The bear was purring, and there was something sweet in its mouth. Her eyes widened with surprise.

"Wanted to make an early breakfast date?" the owl asked.

Clara nodded enthusiastically. "Every Sunday
